title: Gileng Sector
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Gileng Sector''' was a region of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] destroyed and rebuilt by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. During the Vong's occupation of Coruscant, the region was lead by [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Drosh Khalii]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
